          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport random\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass BackoffPolicy:\n    base_delay_sec: float = 1.0\n    multiplier: float = 2.0\n    cap_delay_sec: float = 30.0\n    jitter_ratio: float = 0.2\n\n    def compute_delay(self, attempt: int, rng: random.Random | None = None) -> float:\n        if attempt < 1:\n            raise ValueError(\"attempt must be >= 1\")\n        effective_rng = rng or random.Random()\n\n        base = min(self.cap_delay_sec, self.base_delay_sec * (self.multiplier ** (attempt - 1)))\n        jitter_span = base * self.jitter_ratio\n        jitter = (effective_rng.random() * 2.0 - 1.0) * jitter_span\n        delay = max(0.0, base + jitter)\n        return delay\n"
        },

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom uuid import UUID\n\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field\n\nfrom mini_celery.models import Job, JobEvent, JobState\n\n\nclass CreateJobRequest(BaseModel):\n    type: str\n    payload: dict[str, Any]\n    queue: str = \"default\"\n    max_attempts: int = Field(default=3, ge=1, le=100)\n    run_at: datetime | None = None\n    idempotency_key: str | None = Field(default=None, max_length=200)\n\n\nclass CreateJobResponse(BaseModel):\n    job_id: UUID\n\n\nclass JobResponse(BaseModel):\n    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)\n\n    id: UUID\n    type: str\n    payload: dict[str, Any]\n    state: JobState\n    created_at: datetime\n    updated_at: datetime\n    idempotency_key: str | None = None\n    attempts: int\n    max_attempts: int\n    next_run_at: datetime | None = None\n    schedule: str | None = None\n    last_error: str | None = None\n    result: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n    queue: str\n    cancel_requested: bool\n    lease_expires_at: datetime | None = None\n    last_stream_id: str | None = None\n    enqueued: bool\n    version: int\n\n\nclass JobEventResponse(BaseModel):\n    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)\n\n    id: int\n    job_id: UUID\n    ts: datetime\n    old_state: str | None\n    new_state: str\n    message: str\n    metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n\n\nclass JobsListResponse(BaseModel):\n    items: list[JobResponse]\n    next_cursor: str | None = None\n\n\nclass JobEventsListResponse(BaseModel):\n    items: list[JobEventResponse]\n    next_cursor_ts: datetime | None = None\n\n\nclass ActionJobResponse(BaseModel):\n    job: JobResponse\n\n\ndef job_to_response(job: Job) -> JobResponse:\n    return JobResponse.model_validate(job)\n\n\ndef jobs_to_response(jobs: list[Job]) -> list[JobResponse]:\n    return [job_to_response(job) for job in jobs]\n\n\ndef events_to_response(events: list[JobEvent]) -> list[JobEventResponse]:\n    return [\n        JobEventResponse(\n            id=event.id,\n            job_id=UUID(event.job_id),\n            ts=event.ts,\n            old_state=event.old_state,\n            new_state=event.new_state,\n            message=event.message,\n            metadata=event.event_metadata,\n        )\n        for event in events\n    ]\n"

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\nfrom mini_celery.models import JobState\n\n\nclass InvalidTransition(ValueError):\n    pass\n\n\nALLOWED_TRANSITIONS: dict[JobState, set[JobState]] = {\n    JobState.QUEUED: {JobState.RUNNING, JobState.CANCELED},\n    JobState.RUNNING: {\n        JobState.SUCCEEDED,\n        JobState.FAILED,\n        JobState.CANCELED,\n        JobState.DEAD,\n        JobState.QUEUED,\n    },\n    JobState.FAILED: {JobState.QUEUED},\n    JobState.DEAD: {JobState.QUEUED},\n    JobState.SUCCEEDED: set(),\n    JobState.CANCELED: set(),\n}\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass Transition:\n    old: JobState\n    new: JobState\n\n\ndef can_transition(old: JobState, new: JobState) -> bool:\n    return new in ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS.get(old, set())\n\n\ndef assert_transition(old: JobState, new: JobState) -> None:\n    if not can_transition(old, new):\n        raise InvalidTransition(f\"Invalid transition: {old} -> {new}\")\n"
        },

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nimport json\nimport statistics\nimport time\nfrom typing import Any\n\nimport httpx\nimport typer\n\nfrom mini_celery.config import get_settings\nfrom mini_celery.models import TERMINAL_STATES, JobState\n\napp = typer.Typer(no_args_is_help=True, help=\"mini-celery CLI\")\n\n\ndef _parse_payload(payload: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    try:\n        parsed = json.loads(payload)\n    except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:\n        raise typer.BadParameter(f\"invalid JSON payload: {exc}\") from exc\n    if not isinstance(parsed, dict):\n        raise typer.BadParameter(\"payload must be a JSON object\")\n    return parsed\n\n\\REDACTED(\"submit\")\ndef submit(\n    task_type: str = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Task type\"),\n    payload: str = typer.Option(\"{}\", \"--payload\", help=\"JSON payload\"),\n    queue: str = typer.Option(\"default\", \"--queue\"),\n    max_attempts: int = typer.Option(3, \"--max-attempts\", min=1),\n    run_at: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--run-at\", help=\"RFC3339 timestamp\"),\n    idempotency_key: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--idempotency-key\"),\n) -> None:\n    settings = get_settings()\n    body: dict[str, Any] = {\n        \"type\": task_type,\n        \"payload\": _parse_payload(payload),\n        \"queue\": queue,\n        \"max_attempts\": max_attempts,\n        \"idempotency_key\": idempotency_key,\n    }\n    if run_at:\n        body[\"run_at\"] = run_at\n\n    response = httpx.post(f\"{settings.api_url}/jobs\", json=body, timeout=10.0)\n    response.raise_for_status()\n    data = response.json()\n    typer.echo(json.dumps(data, indent=2))\n\n\\REDACTED(\"status\")\ndef status(job_id: str) -> None:\n    settings = get_settings()\n    response = httpx.get(f\"{settings.api_url}/jobs/{job_id}\", timeout=10.0)\n    response.raise_for_status()\n    typer.echo(json.dumps(response.json(), indent=2))\n\n\\REDACTED(\"list\")\ndef list_jobs(\n    state: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--state\"),\n    task_type: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--type\"),\n    limit: int = typer.Option(20, \"--limit\", min=1, max=100),\n    cursor: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--cursor\"),\n) -> None:\n    settings = get_settings()\n    params = {\n        \"state\": state,\n        \"type\": task_type,\n        \"limit\": limit,\n        \"cursor\": cursor,\n    }\n    filtered = {k: v for k, v in params.items() if v is not None}\n    response = httpx.get(f\"{settings.api_url}/jobs\", params=filtered, timeout=10.0)\n    response.raise_for_status()\n    typer.echo(json.dumps(response.json(), indent=2))\n\n\\REDACTED(\"tail-events\")\ndef tail_events(\n    job_id: str,\n    poll_interval: float = typer.Option(1.0, \"--poll-interval\", min=0.1),\n) -> None:\n    settings = get_settings()\n    cursor_ts: str | None = None\n\n    while True:\n        params: dict[str, object] = {\"limit\": 200}\n        if cursor_ts:\n            params[\"cursor_ts\"] = cursor_ts\n\n        response = httpx.get(\n            f\"{settings.api_url}/jobs/{job_id}/events\",\n            params=params,\n            timeout=10.0,\n        )\n        response.raise_for_status()\n        payload = response.json()\n        events = payload.get(\"items\", [])\n\n        for event in events:\n            typer.echo(json.dumps(event))\n            cursor_ts = event[\"ts\"]\n\n        status_resp = httpx.get(f\"{settings.api_url}/jobs/{job_id}\", timeout=10.0)\n        status_resp.raise_for_status()\n        state = status_resp.json()[\"state\"]\n        if JobState(state) in TERMINAL_STATES:\n            break\n\n        time.sleep(poll_interval)\n\n\nasync def _loadtest_impl(\n    *,\n    api_url: str,\n    total: int,\n    concurrency: int,\n    task_type: str,\n    payload: dict[str, Any],\n    max_attempts: int,\n) -> None:\n    submission_times: dict[str, float] = {}\n    completion_times: dict[str, float] = {}\n    semaphore = asyncio.Semaphore(concurrency)\n\n    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=20.0) as client:\n\n        async def submit_one(index: int) -> None:\n            async with semaphore:\n                idempotency_key = f\"loadtest-{index}-{int(time.time() * 1000)}\"\n                request_body = {\n                    \"type\": task_type,\n                    \"payload\": payload,\n                    \"queue\": \"default\",\n                    \"max_attempts\": max_attempts,\n                    \"idempotency_key\": idempotency_key,\n                }\n                t0 = time.perf_counter()\n                response = await client.post(f\"{api_url}/jobs\", json=request_body)\n                response.raise_for_status()\n                job_id = response.json()[\"job_id\"]\n                submission_times[job_id] = t0\n\n        started = time.perf_counter()\n        await asyncio.gather(*[submit_one(i) for i in range(total)])\n        submitted_at = time.perf_counter()\n\n        pending = set(submission_times.keys())\n        while pending:\n            await asyncio.sleep(0.2)\n            for job_id in list(pending):\n                response = await client.get(f\"{api_url}/jobs/{job_id}\")\n                response.raise_for_status()\n                state = JobState(response.json()[\"state\"])\n                if state in TERMINAL_STATES:\n                    completion_times[job_id] = time.perf_counter()\n                    pending.remove(job_id)\n\n        ended = time.perf_counter()\n\n    submit_throughput = total / max(submitted_at - started, 1e-9)\n    end_to_end_throughput = total / max(ended - started, 1e-9)\n    latencies = [completion_times[job_id] - submission_times[job_id] for job_id in submission_times]\n\n    def percentile(values: list[float], p: float) -> float:\n        if not values:\n            return 0.0\n        ordered = sorted(values)\n        idx = min(len(ordered) - 1, round((len(ordered) - 1) * p))\n        return ordered[idx]\n\n    report = {\n        \"total_jobs\": total,\n        \"submit_throughput_jobs_per_sec\": round(submit_throughput, 3),\n        \"end_to_end_throughput_jobs_per_sec\": round(end_to_end_throughput, 3),\n        \"latency_seconds\": {\n            \"min\": round(min(latencies), 4),\n            \"mean\": round(statistics.mean(latencies), 4),\n            \"p50\": round(percentile(latencies, 0.50), 4),\n            \"p95\": round(percentile(latencies, 0.95), 4),\n            \"max\": round(max(latencies), 4),\n        },\n    }\n    typer.echo(json.dumps(report, indent=2))\n\n\\REDACTED(\"loadtest\")\ndef loadtest(\n    total: int = typer.Option(100, \"--total\", min=1),\n    concurrency: int = typer.Option(10, \"--concurrency\", min=1),\n    task_type: str = typer.Option(\"sleep\", \"--task-type\"),\n    payload: str = typer.Option('{\"seconds\":0.05}', \"--payload\"),\n    max_attempts: int = typer.Option(3, \"--max-attempts\", min=1),\n) -> None:\n    settings = get_settings()\n    asyncio.run(\n        _loadtest_impl(\n            api_url=settings.api_url,\n            total=total,\n            concurrency=concurrency,\n            task_type=task_type,\n            payload=_parse_payload(payload),\n            max_attempts=max_attempts,\n        )\n    )\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    app()\n"
        },

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom enum import StrEnum\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, Boolean, DateTime, Integer, String, Text, UniqueConstraint\nfrom sqlalchemy import Enum as SAEnum\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase, Mapped, mapped_column\n\n\nclass Base(DeclarativeBase):\n    pass\n\n\nclass JobState(StrEnum):\n    QUEUED = \"QUEUED\"\n    RUNNING = \"RUNNING\"\n    SUCCEEDED = \"SUCCEEDED\"\n    FAILED = \"FAILED\"\n    CANCELED = \"CANCELED\"\n    DEAD = \"DEAD\"\n\n\nTERMINAL_STATES: set[JobState] = {\n    JobState.SUCCEEDED,\n    JobState.FAILED,\n    JobState.CANCELED,\n    JobState.DEAD,\n}\n\n\nclass IdempotencyStatus(StrEnum):\n    IN_PROGRESS = \"IN_PROGRESS\"\n    SUCCEEDED = \"SUCCEEDED\"\n\n\ndef utc_now() -> datetime:\n    return datetime.now(UTC)\n\n\nclass Job(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"jobs\"\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid4()))\n    type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), index=True)\n    payload: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON)\n    state: Mapped[JobState] = mapped_column(SAEnum(JobState, native_enum=False), index=True)\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True),\n        default=utc_now,\n        index=True,\n    )\n    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True),\n        default=utc_now,\n        onupdate=utc_now,\n    )\n\n    idempotency_key: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(200), nullable=True, index=True)\n    attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=0)\n    max_attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=3)\n\n    next_run_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True),\n        nullable=True,\n        index=True,\n    )\n    schedule: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(200), nullable=True)\n\n    last_error: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n    result: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\n\n    queue: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), default=\"default\", index=True)\n    cancel_requested: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False)\n    lease_expires_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True),\n        nullable=True,\n    )\n    last_stream_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=True)\n    enqueued: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, index=True)\n    version: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=0)\n\n\nclass JobEvent(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"job_events\"\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\n    job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), index=True)\n    ts: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now, index=True)\n    old_state: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=True)\n    new_state: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20))\n    message: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text)\n    event_metadata: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(\n        \"metadata\",\n        JSON,\n        nullable=True,\n    )\n\n\nclass IdempotencyLock(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"idempotency_locks\"\n\n    key: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(200), primary_key=True)\n    owner_job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), index=True)\n    status: Mapped[IdempotencyStatus] = mapped_column(\n        SAEnum(IdempotencyStatus, native_enum=False),\n        default=IdempotencyStatus.IN_PROGRESS,\n    )\n    result: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\n    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True),\n        default=utc_now,\n        onupdate=utc_now,\n    )\n\n\nclass ScheduleTick(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"schedule_ticks\"\n    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint(\"schedule_id\", \"planned_time\", name=\"uq_schedule_tick\"),)\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\n    schedule_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(200), index=True)\n    planned_time: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), index=True)\n    job_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(36), nullable=True)\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now)\n"
        },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom collections.abc import Iterator\nfrom contextlib import contextmanager\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime, timedelta\nfrom typing import Any, Literal\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import and_, select\nfrom sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n\nfrom mini_celery.models import (\n    TERMINAL_STATES,\n    IdempotencyLock,\n    IdempotencyStatus,\n    Job,\n    JobEvent,\n    JobState,\n    ScheduleTick,\n)\nfrom mini_celery.state_machine import InvalidTransition, assert_transition\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass RunningJob:\n    id: str\n    type: str\n    payload: dict[str, Any]\n    attempt: int\n    max_attempts: int\n    idempotency_key: str | None\n    queue: str\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass ClaimOutcome:\n    action: Literal[\"execute\", \"ack\", \"skip\"]\n    reason: str\n    job: RunningJob | None = None\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass JobPage:\n    items: list[Job]\n    next_cursor: str | None\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass EventPage:\n    items: list[JobEvent]\n    next_cursor_ts: datetime | None\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass FailureOutcome:\n    state: JobState\n    delay_sec: float | None\n\n\nclass Repository:\n    def __init__(self, session_factory: sessionmaker[Session]):\n        self._session_factory = session_factory\n\n    @contextmanager\n    def _session(self) -> Iterator[Session]:\n        session = self._session_factory()\n        try:\n            yield session\n            session.commit()\n        except Exception:\n            session.rollback()\n            raise\n        finally:\n            session.close()\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def _to_utc(dt: datetime) -> datetime:\n        if dt.tzinfo is None:\n            return dt.replace(tzinfo=UTC)\n        return dt.astimezone(UTC)\n\n    def _append_event(\n        self,\n        session: Session,\n        *,\n        job_id: str,\n        old_state: JobState | None,\n        new_state: JobState,\n        message: str,\n        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        event = JobEvent(\n            job_id=job_id,\n            ts=datetime.now(UTC),\n            old_state=old_state.value if old_state else None,\n            new_state=new_state.value,\n            message=message,\n            event_metadata=metadata,\n        )\n        session.add(event)\n\n    def create_job(\n        self,\n        *,\n        type: str,\n        payload: dict[str, Any],\n        queue: str,\n        max_attempts: int,\n        next_run_at: datetime,\n        idempotency_key: str | None,\n        schedule: str | None = None,\n    ) -> Job:\n        now = datetime.now(UTC)\n        with self._session() as session:\n            job = Job(\n                id=str(uuid4()),\n                type=type,\n                payload=payload,\n                state=JobState.QUEUED,\n                created_at=now,\n                updated_at=now,\n                idempotency_key=idempotency_key,\n                attempts=0,\n                max_attempts=max_attempts,\n                next_run_at=self._to_utc(next_run_at),\n                schedule=schedule,\n                queue=queue,\n                cancel_requested=False,\n                enqueued=False,\n                version=0,\n            )\n            session.add(job)\n            self._append_event(\n                session,\n                job_id=job.id,\n                old_state=None,\n                new_state=JobState.QUEUED,\n                message=\"job created\",\n                metadata={\"queue\": queue},\n            )\n            session.flush()\n            session.refresh(job)\n            return job\n\n    def find_non_terminal_by_idempotency_key(self, key: str) -> Job | None:\n        with self._session() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(Job)\n                .where(\n                    and_(\n                        Job.idempotency_key == key,\n                        Job.state.notin_(list(TERMINAL_STATES)),\n                    )\n                )\n                .order_by(Job.created_at.desc())\n                .limit(1)\n            )\n            return session.execute(stmt).scalar_one_or_none()\n\n    def get_job(self, job_id: str) -> Job | None:\n        with self._session() as session:\n            return session.get(Job, job_id)\n\n    def list_jobs(\n        self,\n        *,\n        state: JobState | None,\n        type: str | None,\n        limit: int,\n        cursor: str | None,\n    ) -> JobPage:\n        with self._session() as session:\n            stmt = select(Job)\n            if state:\n                stmt = stmt.where(Job.state == state.value)\n            if type:\n                stmt = stmt.where(Job.type == type)\n\n            if cursor:\n                cursor_time, cursor_id = self._decode_cursor(cursor)\n                stmt = stmt.where(\n                    (Job.created_at < cursor_time)\n                    | ((Job.created_at == cursor_time) & (Job.id < cursor_id))\n                )\n\n            stmt = stmt.order_by(Job.created_at.desc(), Job.id.desc()).limit(limit + 1)\n            jobs = list(session.execute(stmt).scalars().all())\n\n            next_cursor: str | None = None\n            if len(jobs) > limit:\n                tail = jobs.pop()\n                next_cursor = self._encode_cursor(tail.created_at, tail.id)\n\n            return JobPage(items=jobs, next_cursor=next_cursor)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def _encode_cursor(created_at: datetime, job_id: str) -> str:\n        return f\"{created_at.isoformat()}|{job_id}\"\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def _decode_cursor(cursor: str) -> tuple[datetime, str]:\n        raw_ts, job_id = cursor.split(\"|\", maxsplit=1)\n        dt = datetime.fromisoformat(raw_ts)\n        if dt.tzinfo is None:\n            dt = dt.replace(tzinfo=UTC)\n        return dt, job_id\n\n    def list_job_events(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_id: str,\n        cursor_ts: datetime | None,\n        limit: int,\n    ) -> EventPage:\n        with self._session() as session:\n            stmt = select(JobEvent).where(JobEvent.job_id == job_id)\n            if cursor_ts is not None:\n                stmt = stmt.where(JobEvent.ts > self._to_utc(cursor_ts))\n            stmt = stmt.order_by(JobEvent.ts.asc(), JobEvent.id.asc()).limit(limit + 1)\n\n            events = list(session.execute(stmt).scalars().all())\n            next_cursor_ts: datetime | None = None\n            if len(events) > limit:\n                tail = events.pop()\n                next_cursor_ts = tail.ts\n\n            return EventPage(items=events, next_cursor_ts=next_cursor_ts)\n\n    def mark_enqueued(self, job_id: str, stream_id: str) -> bool:\n        with self._session() as session:\n            job = session.get(Job, job_id)\n            if job is None:\n                return False\n            if job.state != JobState.QUEUED or job.cancel_requested:\n                return False\n\n            job.enqueued = True\n            job.last_stream_id = stream_id\n            job.updated_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n            job.version += 1\n            session.add(job)\n            return True\n\n    def get_due_jobs(self, now: datetime, limit: int = 100) -> list[Job]:\n        with self._session() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(Job)\n                .where(\n                    and_(\n                        Job.state == JobState.QUEUED,\n                        Job.enqueued.is_(False),\n                        Job.cancel_requested.is_(False),\n                        Job.next_run_at <= self._to_utc(now),\n                    )\n                )\n                .order_by(Job.next_run_at.asc(), Job.created_at.asc())\n                .limit(limit)\n            )\n            return list(session.execute(stmt).scalars().all())\n\n    def cancel_job(self, job_id: str) -> Job | None:\n        now = datetime.now(UTC)\n        with self._session() as session:\n            job = session.get(Job, job_id)\n            if job is None:\n                return None\n\n            if job.state == JobState.QUEUED:\n                assert_transition(JobState.QUEUED, JobState.CANCELED)\n                old = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.CANCELED\n                job.cancel_requested = True\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.version += 1\n                self._append_event(\n                    session,\n                    job_id=job.id,\n                    old_state=old,\n                    new_state=JobState.CANCELED,\n                    message=\"job canceled\",\n                )\n            elif job.state == JobState.RUNNING:\n                job.cancel_requested = True\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.version += 1\n                self._append_event(\n                    session,\n                    job_id=job.id,\n                    old_state=JobState.RUNNING,\n                    new_state=JobState.RUNNING,\n                    message=\"cancel requested\",\n                )\n            session.add(job)\n            session.flush()\n            session.refresh(job)\n            return job\n\n    def retry_job(self, job_id: str) -> Job:\n        now = datetime.now(UTC)\n        with self._session() as session:\n            job = session.get(Job, job_id)\n            if job is None:\n                raise KeyError(job_id)\n            if job.state not in {JobState.FAILED, JobState.DEAD}:\n                raise InvalidTransition(f\"retry allowed only from FAILED/DEAD, got {job.state}\")\n\n            old = job.state\n            assert_transition(old, JobState.QUEUED)\n            job.state = JobState.QUEUED\n            job.attempts = 0\n            job.last_error = None\n            job.result = None\n            job.cancel_requested = False\n            job.next_run_at = now\n            job.lease_expires_at = None\n            job.enqueued = False\n            job.updated_at = now\n            job.version += 1\n            self._append_event(\n                session,\n                job_id=job.id,\n                old_state=old,\n                new_state=JobState.QUEUED,\n                message=\"manual retry requested\",\n            )\n            session.add(job)\n            session.flush()\n            session.refresh(job)\n            return job\n\n    def is_cancel_requested(self, job_id: str) -> bool:\n        with self._session() as session:\n            job = session.get(Job, job_id)\n            return bool(job and job.cancel_requested)\n\n    def claim_for_execution(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_id: str,\n        stream_id: str,\n        consumer: str,\n        visibility_timeout_sec: int,\n        now: datetime,\n    ) -> ClaimOutcome:\n        ts = self._to_utc(now)\n        with self._session() as session:\n            job = session.get(Job, job_id)\n            if job is None:\n                return ClaimOutcome(action=\"ack\", reason=\"missing_job\")\n\n            if job.state in TERMINAL_STATES:\n                return ClaimOutcome(action=\"ack\", reason=f\"already_terminal:{job.state.value}\")\n\n            if job.state == JobState.RUNNING:\n                if job.lease_expires_at and self._to_utc(job.lease_expires_at) > ts:\n                    return ClaimOutcome(action=\"skip\", reason=\"active_lease\")\n\n                assert_transition(JobState.RUNNING, JobState.QUEUED)\n                old_state = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.QUEUED\n                job.enqueued = True\n                job.updated_at = ts\n                job.version += 1\n                self._append_event(\n                    session,\n                    job_id=job.id,\n                    old_state=old_state,\n                    new_state=JobState.QUEUED,\n                    message=\"lease expired, reclaiming\",\n                    metadata={\"consumer\": consumer, \"stream_id\": stream_id},\n                )\n\n            if job.state != JobState.QUEUED:\n                return ClaimOutcome(action=\"ack\", reason=f\"not_queueable:{job.state.value}\")\n\n            if job.cancel_requested:\n                assert_transition(JobState.QUEUED, JobState.CANCELED)\n                old = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.CANCELED\n                job.updated_at = ts\n                job.version += 1\n                self._append_event(\n                    session,\n                    job_id=job.id,\n                    old_state=old,\n                    new_state=JobState.CANCELED,\n                    message=\"canceled before execution\",\n                )\n                session.add(job)\n                return ClaimOutcome(action=\"ack\", reason=\"canceled\")\n\n            if job.next_run_at and self._to_utc(job.next_run_at) > ts:\n                job.enqueued = False\n                job.updated_at = ts\n                job.version += 1\n                session.add(job)\n                return ClaimOutcome(action=\"ack\", reason=\"not_due_yet\")\n\n            if job.idempotency_key:\n                lock = session.get(IdempotencyLock, job.idempotency_key)\n                if lock and lock.status == IdempotencyStatus.SUCCEEDED:\n                    assert_transition(JobState.QUEUED, JobState.SUCCEEDED)\n                    old = job.state\n                    job.state = JobState.SUCCEEDED\n                    job.result = lock.result\n                    job.last_error = None\n                    job.lease_expires_at = None\n                    job.updated_at = ts\n                    job.version += 1\n                    self._append_event(\n                        session,\n                        job_id=job.id,\n                        old_state=old,\n                        new_state=JobState.SUCCEEDED,\n                        message=\"short-circuited by idempotency key\",\n                    )\n                    session.add(job)\n                    return ClaimOutcome(action=\"ack\", reason=\"idempotent_success\")\n\n            assert_transition(JobState.QUEUED, JobState.RUNNING)\n            old = job.state\n            job.state = JobState.RUNNING\n            job.attempts += 1\n            job.lease_expires_at = ts + timedelta(seconds=visibility_timeout_sec)\n            job.updated_at = ts\n            job.last_stream_id = stream_id\n            job.version += 1\n            self._append_event(\n                session,\n                job_id=job.id,\n                old_state=old,\n                new_state=JobState.RUNNING,\n                message=\"execution started\",\n                metadata={\"stream_id\": stream_id, \"consumer\": consumer, \"attempt\": job.attempts},\n            )\n\n            if job.idempotency_key:\n                existing_lock = session.get(IdempotencyLock, job.idempotency_key)\n                if existing_lock is None:\n                    session.add(\n                        IdempotencyLock(\n                            key=job.idempotency_key,\n                            owner_job_id=job.id,\n                            status=IdempotencyStatus.IN_PROGRESS,\n                            updated_at=ts,\n                        )\n                    )\n                elif existing_lock.owner_job_id == job.id:\n                    existing_lock.updated_at = ts\n                    session.add(existing_lock)\n\n            session.add(job)\n            running = RunningJob(\n                id=job.id,\n                type=job.type,\n                payload=job.payload,\n                attempt=job.attempts,\n                max_attempts=job.max_attempts,\n                idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\n                queue=job.queue,\n            )\n            return ClaimOutcome(action=\"execute\", reason=\"ready\", job=running)\n\n    def finalize_success(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_id: str,\n        result: dict[str, Any] | None,\n        stream_id: str,\n    ) -> JobState:\n        now = datetime.now(UTC)\n        with self._session() as session:\n            job = session.get(Job, job_id)\n            if job is None:\n                return JobState.DEAD\n            if job.state != JobState.RUNNING:\n                return job.state\n\n            assert_transition(JobState.RUNNING, JobState.SUCCEEDED)\n            old = job.state\n            job.state = JobState.SUCCEEDED\n            job.result = result\n            job.last_error = None\n            job.lease_expires_at = None\n            job.updated_at = now\n            job.version += 1\n            self._append_event(\n                session,\n                job_id=job.id,\n                old_state=old,\n                new_state=JobState.SUCCEEDED,\n                message=\"job succeeded\",\n                metadata={\"stream_id\": stream_id, \"attempt\": job.attempts},\n            )\n\n            if job.idempotency_key:\n                lock = session.get(IdempotencyLock, job.idempotency_key)\n                if lock is None:\n                    lock = IdempotencyLock(\n                        key=job.idempotency_key,\n                        owner_job_id=job.id,\n                    )\n                lock.owner_job_id = job.id\n                lock.status = IdempotencyStatus.SUCCEEDED\n                lock.result = result\n                lock.updated_at = now\n                session.add(lock)\n\n            session.add(job)\n            return job.state\n\n    def finalize_canceled(self, *, job_id: str, stream_id: str) -> JobState:\n        now = datetime.now(UTC)\n        with self._session() as session:\n            job = session.get(Job, job_id)\n            if job is None:\n                return JobState.CANCELED\n            if job.state != JobState.RUNNING:\n                return job.state\n\n            assert_transition(JobState.RUNNING, JobState.CANCELED)\n            old = job.state\n            job.state = JobState.CANCELED\n            job.last_error = \"canceled\"\n            job.lease_expires_at = None\n            job.updated_at = now\n            job.version += 1\n            self._append_event(\n                session,\n                job_id=job.id,\n                old_state=old,\n                new_state=JobState.CANCELED,\n                message=\"job canceled during execution\",\n                metadata={\"stream_id\": stream_id, \"attempt\": job.attempts},\n            )\n            session.add(job)\n            return job.state\n\n    def finalize_failure(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_id: str,\n        stream_id: str,\n        error: str,\n        retryable: bool,\n        delay_sec: float,\n    ) -> FailureOutcome:\n        now = datetime.now(UTC)\n        with self._session() as session:\n            job = session.get(Job, job_id)\n            if job is None:\n                return FailureOutcome(state=JobState.DEAD, delay_sec=None)\n            if job.state != JobState.RUNNING:\n                return FailureOutcome(state=job.state, delay_sec=None)\n\n            if retryable and job.attempts < job.max_attempts:\n                assert_transition(JobState.RUNNING, JobState.QUEUED)\n                old = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.QUEUED\n                job.next_run_at = now + timedelta(seconds=delay_sec)\n                job.enqueued = False\n                job.last_error = error\n                job.lease_expires_at = None\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.version += 1\n                self._append_event(\n                    session,\n                    job_id=job.id,\n                    old_state=old,\n                    new_state=JobState.QUEUED,\n                    message=\"job failed; scheduled retry\",\n                    metadata={\n                        \"stream_id\": stream_id,\n                        \"attempt\": job.attempts,\n                        \"delay_sec\": round(delay_sec, 6),\n                    },\n                )\n                session.add(job)\n                return FailureOutcome(state=job.state, delay_sec=delay_sec)\n\n            terminal = JobState.DEAD if retryable else JobState.FAILED\n            assert_transition(JobState.RUNNING, terminal)\n            old = job.state\n            job.state = terminal\n            job.last_error = error\n            job.lease_expires_at = None\n            job.updated_at = now\n            job.version += 1\n            self._append_event(\n                session,\n                job_id=job.id,\n                old_state=old,\n                new_state=terminal,\n                message=\"job failed terminally\",\n                metadata={\"stream_id\": stream_id, \"attempt\": job.attempts, \"retryable\": retryable},\n            )\n            session.add(job)\n            return FailureOutcome(state=job.state, delay_sec=None)\n\n    def create_scheduled_job_if_new(\n        self,\n        *,\n        schedule_id: str,\n        planned_time: datetime,\n        queue: str,\n        type: str,\n        payload: dict[str, Any],\n        max_attempts: int,\n    ) -> Job | None:\n        planned = self._to_utc(planned_time)\n        with self._session() as session:\n            tick = ScheduleTick(schedule_id=schedule_id, planned_time=planned)\n            session.add(tick)\n            try:\n                session.flush()\n            except IntegrityError:\n                session.rollback()\n                return None\n\n            now = datetime.now(UTC)\n            job = Job(\n                id=str(uuid4()),\n                type=type,\n                payload=payload,\n                state=JobState.QUEUED,\n                created_at=now,\n                updated_at=now,\n                attempts=0,\n                max_attempts=max_attempts,\n                next_run_at=planned,\n                schedule=schedule_id,\n                queue=queue,\n                cancel_requested=False,\n                enqueued=False,\n                version=0,\n            )\n            session.add(job)\n            session.flush()\n            tick.job_id = job.id\n            session.add(tick)\n            self._append_event(\n                session,\n                job_id=job.id,\n                old_state=None,\n                new_state=JobState.QUEUED,\n                message=\"job created from schedule\",\n                metadata={\"schedule_id\": schedule_id, \"planned_time\": planned.isoformat()},\n            )\n            session.flush()\n            session.refresh(job)\n            return job\n\n    def count_jobs(self) -> int:\n        with self._session() as session:\n            return session.query(Job).count()\n"
        },

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport argparse\nimport subprocess\nimport sys\n\n\ndef run(cmd: list[str]) -> int:\n    print(\"$\", \" \".join(cmd), flush=True)\n    return subprocess.call(cmd)\n\n\ndef main() -> int:\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Fallback task runner when make is unavailable\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"command\", choices=[\"up\", \"down\", \"lint\", \"test\", \"loadtest\"])\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    if args.command == \"up\":\n        return run([\"docker\", \"compose\", \"up\", \"--build\", \"-d\"])\n    if args.command == \"down\":\n        return run([\"docker\", \"compose\", \"down\", \"-v\"])\n    if args.command == \"lint\":\n        steps = [\n            [sys.executable, \"-m\", \"ruff\", \"check\", \".\"],\n            [sys.executable, \"-m\", \"ruff\", \"format\", \"--check\", \".\"],\n            [sys.executable, \"-m\", \"mypy\", \"mini_celery\"],\n        ]\n        for step in steps:\n            code = run(step)\n            if code:\n                return code\n        return 0\n    if args.command == \"test\":\n        code = run(\n            [\n                \"docker\",\n                \"compose\",\n                \"-f\",\n                \"docker-compose.test.yml\",\n                \"up\",\n                \"--build\",\n                \"--abort-on-container-exit\",\n                \"--exit-code-from\",\n                \"test\",\n            ]\n        )\n        down_code = run([\"docker\", \"compose\", \"-f\", \"docker-compose.test.yml\", \"down\", \"-v\"])\n        return code or down_code\n    if args.command == \"loadtest\":\n        return run(\n            [\n                sys.executable,\n                \"-m\",\n                \"mini_celery.cli\",\n                \"loadtest\",\n                \"--total\",\n                \"100\",\n                \"--concurrency\",\n                \"10\",\n                \"--task-type\",\n                \"sleep\",\n                \"--payload\",\n                '{\"seconds\":0.05}',\n            ]\n        )\n\n    return 1\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    raise SystemExit(main())\n"
        },
